display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(36, 41, 47) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🛡️ 1. Code Quality Checks
├─ Checkout (actions/checkout@v4)
│ └─ Pull code from GitHub
├─ Setup Node (actions/setup-node@v4)
│ └─ Install Node v20 & npm cache
├─ Install Dependencies (npm ci)
│ └─ Download packages (package-lock.json)
├─ 🧹 Lint Check (npx eslint .)
│ └─ Check code syntax & style rules
├─ 🏷️ Type Check (npx tsc --noEmit)
│ └─ Strict TypeScript type validation
└─ 🧪 Unit Tests (npm run test:coverage)
└─ Execute Vitest components testing

div.style: color: rgb(36, 41, 47) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🗄️ 2. Database Migration
├─ Checkout (actions/checkout@v4)
│ └─ Pull repository code from branch main
├─ Setup Node (actions/setup-node@v4)
│ └─ Install Node.js v20 & configure npm cache
├─ Install Dependencies (npm ci)
│ └─ Strict installation from package-lock.json
├─ Load Secrets (DATABASE_URL)
│ └─ Inject TEST_DATABASE_URL from GitHub Secrets
└─ Run Migration (npx drizzle-kit push)
└─ Compare schema.ts with Neon DB and apply changes

div.style: color: rgb(36, 41, 47) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🤖 3. E2E Tests (Playwright)
├─ Checkout (actions/checkout@v4)
│ └─ Pull repository code from branch main
├─ Setup Node (actions/setup-node@v4)
│ └─ Install Node.js v20 & configure npm cache
├─ Install Dependencies (npm ci)
│ └─ Strict installation from package-lock.json
├─ Build Application (npm run build)
│ └─ Compile Next.js pages and optimize assets
├─ Setup Browsers (playwright install --with-deps)
│ └─ Download Chromium, Firefox, WebKit binaries
├─ Run Playwright Tests (npx playwright test)
│ └─ Launch headless browsers and execute UI test scripts
└─ Upload Artifacts (actions/upload-artifact@v4)
└─ Save HTML reports and failure traces for 30 days
